passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
source_phrases: This pass allows 1/2 price admission for up to three (3) people for  the Discovery Museum, as well as Discovery Woods. Any people accompanying the 3 pass users will still pay the regular admission fee of $19.
Visitors are advised to confirm Museum's public hours by visiting www.discoveryacton.org or by calling The Museum at (978) 264-4200.
This pass is NOT a ticket reservation; you must purchase tickets at the Museum upon arrival. Advanced tickets reservations are no longer required.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
passes.benefit_text:
Pass allows 50% Discount for up to two(2) adults and two(2) children in one vehicle. Children under 2 are free. 
Pass does not cover tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express train, or special ticketed events.
May not be combined with other offers, group rates, or special event prices.
No pets please.
source_phrases: Pass allows 50% Discount for up to two(2) adults and two(2) children in one vehicle. Children under 2 are free.
Pass does not cover tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express train, or special ticketed events.
May not be combined with other offers, group rates, or special event prices.
No pets please.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
Each Library Pass is valid for up to two (2) museum admission tickets at the discounted Library Pass price of $10 per ticket .
Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films .
For more details, visit the ICA website: https://www.icaboston.org/visit

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
source_phrases: This pass offers discounted $5 admission for up to 4 adults. Admission is free for children under age 18.
Patrons must present both this library pass and their timed admission ticket for entry into the museum.
For more information, including health and safety requirements, please visit the ISGM's Know Before You Go page .

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
THIS PASS DOES NOT NEED TO BE RESERVED!
Simply present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the JFK Library Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket. No pass is needed. This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission.
Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.
source_phrases: THIS PASS DOES NOT NEED TO BE RESERVED!

Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. With this pass, admission is discounted to $2 per visitor over the age of 2.
For a list of Wildlife Sanctuaries & Properties, please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/places-to-explore/wildlife-sanctuaries
Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information, including safety guidelines.

Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information, including safety guidelines.

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text: Pass allows for free parking of ONE (1) vehicle at any DCR location that charges a parking fee, EXCEPT:  Quabbin Reservoir, the Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots.
source_phrases: Pass allows for free parking of ONE (1) vehicle at any DCR location that charges a parking fee, EXCEPT:  Quabbin Reservoir, the Squantum Point, NorthPoint, or Draw Seven Commuter Lots.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Passes  admit up to 2 adults ($15 per person) and up to 4 youths ages 7–17 ($10 per person). Children 6 and under are free.
Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old.
Please present the coupon code attached to your confirmation email when reserving your tickets to redeem your pass.

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
·         Passes available Sept 1 through May 31.
·         Each coupon admits up to four people at a discounted Aquarium admission price of 50% off per person. Children two and under are always free. 
·         Only applies to adult and child pricing. Children two and under are always free.
·         Valid only for Aquarium admission.
·       This offer cannot be combined with other offers or coupons and is not valid for movie or whale watch tickets.
·         Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.

·         Valid only for Aquarium admission.

·         Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details.
·         Review the Aquarium’s website at www.neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
Pass grants free admission for up to two (2) visitors.
Physical pass must be picked up at library on date of use and returned day after use.
source_phrases: Pass grants free admission for up to two (2) visitors.
Physical pass must be picked up at library on date of use and returned day after use.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
This pass gives you access to purchase the following discount:
$9.00 per adult
$6.00 per child
For up to 6 tickets.
Valid for general daytime admission to Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo only. Please check for special zoo closures while making your reservation.
